exercises.name: Cycle Cross Trainer
instructions: Adjust the machine to your size and select the load.
Keep a steady pace adapted to your fitness level.
Engage your core and keep an upright posture throughout.
Continue for the planned time or repetitions.

instructions: Adjust the machine to your size and select the load.
Keep a steady pace adapted to your fitness level.
Engage your core and keep an upright posture throughout.
Continue for the planned time or repetitions.

exercises.name: Single Leg Platform Slide
instructions: Adjust the machine to your size and select the load.
Pre-engage the hamstrings before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Machine Lat Pulldown
instructions: Adjust the machine to your size and select the load.
Pre-engage the lats before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Machine Inner Chest Press
instructions: Adjust the machine to your size and select the load.
Pre-engage the chest before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.
